chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6166 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on Misc. No.27410/2024 3. For hearing of main case 11.12.2024 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the petitioner This petition seeks writ against a Bank in respect of opening an account. Prima facie no case is discernible for issuing a writ against a Bank. Furthermore, page 33 demonstrates that restraint originated pursuant to orders of the High Court in different proceedings. Recourse to this petition to overrule any such directions could not be demonstrated to be tenable. In view hereof this petition found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
